testcase.name: test_async_get_forecast_by_coordinates

failure.message: RuntimeError: There is no current event loop in thread 'MainThread'.

testcase.failure:
self = <test.test_init.FMIWeatherTest testMethod=test_async_get_forecast_by_coordinates> mock_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4486111520'>
@mock.patch('requests.get', side_effect=test_data.mock_coordinate_forecast_response) def test_async_get_forecast_by_coordinates(self, mock_get): > loop = asyncio.get_event_loop() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
test/test_init.py:54: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <asyncio.unix_events._UnixDefaultEventLoopPolicy object at 0x10b64a3c0>
def get_event_loop(self): """Get the event loop for the current context.
Returns an instance of EventLoop or raises an exception. """ if self._local._loop is None: > raise RuntimeError('There is no current event loop in thread %r.' % threading.current_thread().name) E RuntimeError: There is no current event loop in thread 'MainThread'.
/opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/asyncio/events.py:715: RuntimeError

testcase.name: test_get_forecast_by_coordinates
testcase.failure:
self = <test.test_init.FMIWeatherTest testMethod=test_get_forecast_by_coordinates> mock_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4486115888'>
@mock.patch('requests.get', side_effect=test_data.mock_coordinate_forecast_response) def test_get_forecast_by_coordinates(self, mock_get): > forecast = fmi_weather_client.forecast_by_coordinates(29.742731, 67.583988) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
test/test_init.py:49: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ fmi_weather_client/__init__.py:97: in forecast_by_coordinates response = http.request_forecast_by_coordinates(lat, lon, timestep_hours) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ fmi_weather_client/http.py:54: in request_forecast_by_coordinates return _send_request(params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
params = {'endtime': '2026-03-07T16:49:15+00:00', 'latlon': '29.742731,67.583988', 'parameters': 'Temperature,DewPoint,Pressure...iationNetSurfaceSWAccumulation,RadiationNetSurfaceLWAccumulation,GeopHeight,LandSeaMask', 'request': 'getFeature', ...}
def _send_request(params: Dict[str, Any]) -> str: """ Send a request to FMI service and return the body :param params: Query parameters :return: Response body """ url = 'http://opendata.fmi.fi/wfs'
_LOGGER.debug("GET request to %s. Parameters: %s", url, params) response = treq.get(url, params=params, timeout=10)
> if response.status_code == 200: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'status_code'
fmi_weather_client/http.py:132: AttributeError
